name: agents
desc: A framework for building realtime voice AI agents 🤖🎙️📹

name: notebooklm-py
desc: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

name: openchrome
desc: Open-source browser automation MCP server. Control your real Chrome from any AI agent.

name: Sage
desc: Multi-Agent System Framework For Complex Tasks

name: OpenViking
desc: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

name: mateclaw
desc: 🤖 MateClaw — Your second brain with Multi-Agent Orchestration, MCP Protocol, Skills & Memory, Dream, and Multi-Channel Support. Built on Spring AI Alibaba.

name: qwen-code
desc: An open-source AI agent that lives in your terminal.

name: OpenContracts
desc: Humans and AI agents, building knowledge bases together. Self-hosted document annotation, version control, semantic search, and MCP.

name: costrict
desc: Costrict - strict AI coder for enterprises, quality first, including AI Agent, AI CodeReview, AI Completion.

name: goose
desc: an open source, extensible AI agent that goes beyond code suggestions - install, execute, edit, and test with any LLM
